name: agent-qa
desc: The self-improving QA agent for software teams. A test harness with memory. Write tests in natural language for web and mobile. agent-qa learns from every run,…
descFull: The self-improving QA agent for software teams. A test harness with memory. Write tests in natural language for web and mobile. agent-qa learns from every run, adapts to UI changes, and catches regressions before you ship.
